$comment: Expected canonical post-migration state for docs/save_compat/manifest.json's b1-initial-session-minimal fixture (issue #766). Storage metadata (name, timestamp) is deliberately excluded from gameplay-state equivalence -- see World.Save.Snapshot's SessionSnapshot haddock. Cross-checked by Test.Headless.World.Save.Compat's manifest-driven gate, which ALSO re-encodes the migrated snapshot and fresh-decodes it, asserting full structural equality -- these explicit fields are a human-readable spot check, not the only coverage.
